title: stachys ocymastrum
intro: Stachys ocymastrum, also known as Himalayan betony, is a perennial herb native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Stachys ocymastrum include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, it can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
